title: Celebration RIBBON 2" X100YDS PINK (RI5652)
features: Ribbons are favourites of any florists and loved by all.

Decorate balloons with these great polypropylene ribbons! Also ideal for decorating rooms for parties, chairs, flower bouquets, decorating wedding cars, tables and so much more! Tears easily into any width strip for use in smaller arrangements gifts and fresh or dried flower arrangements.
